name: Examples of Systems
description: Definition of example systems Zxk and verification of their components against the discrete system specification.

elements.text: Zxk is the name of a system whose definition is given in Appendix 3, for k ∈ [1, 168].
NZx2 ∈ FNS(SZx2 × IZx2, SZx2) satisfying Definition A1.155.
RZx2 ∈ FNS(SZx2, OZx2) satisfying Definition A1.155.
